name: PIXELWORKS, INC
summary: Pixelworks, Inc. provides content creation, video delivery, and display processing solutions enabling authentic viewing experiences across screens from cinema to smartphone. Following the January 2026 sale of its semiconductor subsidiary PWSH, the company focuses exclusively on its TrueCut Motion platform, offering motion grading software tools, certification services, and IP licensing for cinematic visualization solutions to filmmakers, display makers, and streaming services.
